---
title: "\'The Girl of the Period\'"
---

## \'The Girl of the Period\'

**Author:** Eliza Lynn Linton
**Date:** 1868
**Imprint:** <i>Saturday Review</i> (14 March 1868) 339-340

### Notes

This was the first of a series of articles published by Linton up to 1877.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
